channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Transportation Sec. Duffy suggests changing air traffic rules and antiquated tech
item.description: U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said on Wednesday he is reconsidering rules that allowed air traffic control supervisors to reduce staffing at Washington’s Reagan National Airport before a fatal Army helicopter-plane collision that killed 67 people last week.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Workday chops 600-plus Bay Area jobs, one-third of worldwide total
item.description: Workday will chop more than 600 jobs in the East Bay as it scouts for opportunities in artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Google scraps its diversity hiring goals as it complies with Trump's new government contractor rules
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is scrapping some of its diversity hiring targets, joining a lengthening list of U.S. companies that have abandoned or scaled back their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: China’s DeepSeek web version is raising security alarms. Here’s why
item.description: The website of the Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek, whose chatbot became the most downloaded app in the United States, has computer code that could send some user login information to a Chinese state-owned telecommunications company that has been barred from operating in the United
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Comcast's Super Bowl broadcast won't just look great in Dolby Vision, but it will have Dolby Atmos sound for the first time
item.description: Thanks to Comcast and Dolby, you'll be able to watch the Super Bowl with Dolby Atmos and Vision in 4K.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Stop navigating the cloud, and start shaping it
item.description: Digital transformation is a journey that organizations embark on to integrate digital technologies into all aspects of their operations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Oppo is launching the world's thinnest foldable in two weeks – and the OnePlus Open 2 should follow soon
item.description: Get ready for the thinnest foldable yet, though we're not yet sure where in the world it's going to be sold.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Judge says Elon Musk's claims of harm from OpenAI are a 'stretch' but welcomes possible trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk's lawyers faced off with OpenAI in court Tuesday as a federal judge weighed the billionaire's request for a court order that would block the ChatGPT maker from converting itself to a for-profit company. U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Quantum networking advances on Earth and in space
item.description: Cisco’s Quantum Summit brought together quantum computing experts last week from around academia, government, and industry and highlighted the progress we’ve seen over the past few months.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cisco researchers highlight emerging threats to AI models
item.description: Cisco security researchers this week detailed a number of threats they are seeing from bad actors trying to infect or attack AI’s most common component – the large language model.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AMD patches microcode security holes after accidental early disclosure
item.description: AMD on Monday issued two patches for severe microcode security flaws, defects that AMD said “could lead to the loss of Secure Encrypted Virtualization (SEV) protection.” The bugs were inadvertently revealed by a partner last week.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 5 things to know about Trump's plan to create a sovereign wealth fund
item.description: President Trump is taking steps to overhaul the way the U.S. government invests its money and change the nature of America’s financial presence abroad.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, The Hill

item.title: Taiwan chip tariff would raise industry costs, analysts say
item.description: President Donald Trump continues to use tariffs like a club to get his way, and is threatening to place tariffs on computer chips made in Taiwan, warning the additional charges could reach as high as 100%.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Linux Foundation’s L3AF brings zero-downtime updates to eBPF network management
item.description: A challenge for enterprises that operate large-scale network infrastructure has long been how to maintain performance while updating critical systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IT budgets unlikely to suffer full effect of Trump’s 10% tariff on Chinese goods
item.description: US President Donald J. Trump’s tariffs on Chinese-made computing equipment are slated to go into effect tonight — but at a much lower rate than he initially threatened.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Super Bowl 2025 Commercials to Watch: A Roundup
item.description: Get ready for the most anticipated event in advertising - Super Bowl 2025! Here's a roundup of the most exciting commercials that will air during the big game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SoftBank and OpenAI set up joint company to push artificial intelligence services
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology giant SoftBank Group and OpenAI stepped up their AI partnership Monday, setting up a 50-50 held company called SB OpenAI Japan.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wheeled wonder robot dog shows off crazy dance moves in all kinds of tough terrain
item.description: Lynx the robot dog from China is pushing boundaries of what autonomous mobile robots can achieve with a groundbreaking design and unique mobility.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft AI investments cause cloud operating income growth to plunge
item.description: Microsoft reported strong earnings on Wednesday, but growth in profits in its intelligent cloud segment is slowing despite booming demand for AI infrastructure. It reported revenue of $25.5 billion in its intelligent cloud segment, around 37% of its total revenue, in the three months to Dec.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How federal land could generate lots of electricity
item.description: "We estimate 10 to 20 million homes could be served from the electricity that are produced from that renewable energy," said Trieu Mai. The post How federal land could generate lots of electricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: How to organize, protect and streamline your inbox with an email alias
item.description: Creating an email alias can help clean up your inbox by organizing emails based on purpose, like creating different aliases for shopping, newsletters and work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
